actions.name: update
actions.script:
IF self.level > 0 THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.fluid_present = true
  IF self.receiving THEN
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.rate = self.static_rate
  END
  SET self.flow.pressure = self.level
ELSE
  SET self.flow.present = false
  SET self.flow.flowing = false
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.flow.rate = 0
  SET self.flow.pressure = 0
END
IF self.level <= self.low_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_low = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_low = false
END
IF self.level >= self.high_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_high = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_high = false
END

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF self.receiving THEN
  SET self.level = MIN(self.level + 25, 100)
  CALL self.update
END

listeners.script:
SET self.receiving = true
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

faults.name: tank_leak
faults.description: Broken tank receiving fluid — close inlet and drain.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure + self.outlet_pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
IF self.running THEN
  ARM dry_run
  SET self.broken = true
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure + self.outlet_pressure
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

ARM dead_head
SET self.broken = true
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_flow

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Pump running without upstream fluid supply.

faults.name: dead_head
faults.description: Pump running against a closed outlet.

faults.name: broken_flow
faults.description: Fluid present at a seized pump — isolate upstream immediately.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.powered == false THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure + self.outlet_pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
SET self.powered = false
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

IF self.running THEN
  ARM dry_run
  SET self.broken = true
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

ARM dead_head
SET self.broken = true
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_flow

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Electric pump running without upstream fluid supply.

faults.name: dead_head
faults.description: Electric pump running against a closed outlet.

faults.name: broken_flow
faults.description: Fluid present at a seized electric pump.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.shaft.driving AND self.broken == false THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = self.rated_rate * SUMSUP.shaft.rpm / self.rated_rpm
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure + self.outlet_pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
    SET self.running = false
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
ELSE
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

listeners.script:
ARM dead_head
SET self.broken = true
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_flow

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Torque pump spinning with no upstream fluid — shaft driving but inlet dry.

faults.name: dead_head
faults.description: Torque pump running against a closed outlet — stop the motor first.

faults.name: broken_flow
faults.description: Fluid present at a seized torque pump.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.signal > self.min_speed_pct AND self.broken == false THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = self.rated_rate * self.signal / 100
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = self.outlet_pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
    SET self.running = false
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
ELSE
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: VFD pump running without upstream fluid supply.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.powered AND ANYSUP.flow.flowing AND self.broken == false THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
  SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
  SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure + self.boost_amount
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

faults.name: cavitation
faults.description: Booster pump cavitating — inlet pressure below minimum.

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    CALL self.copy_upstream
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.blocked THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = false
  SET self.flow.rate = 0
  SET self.flow.temperature = 20
  SET self.flow.fluid_type = ""
ELSE
  IF self.open AND self.opening > 0 THEN
    IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
      SET self.flow.flowing = true
      SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate * self.opening / 100
      SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
      SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
      SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
      SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
      SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
    ELSE
      CALL self.clear_flow
    END
    IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
      SET self.flow.present = true
    END
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

listeners.script:
SET self.powered = true
SET self.open = true
CALL self.update_flow

SET self.powered = false
IF self.fail_open THEN
  SET self.open = true
ELSE
  SET self.open = false
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MAX(MINSUP.flow.pressure - self.resistance * self.flow.rate - self.elevation_change, 0)
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
SET self.pressure_drop = 0
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.flow.composition = ""
    SET self.flow.pressure = 0
    SET self.pressure_drop = 0
    SET self.fluid_flowing = false
    DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    CALL self.copy_upstream
    SET self.pressure_drop = self.resistance * self.flow.rate + self.elevation_change
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET_SKIN SELF "flowing"
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.flow.composition = ""
    SET self.flow.pressure = 0
    DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = WMIX(flow.rate).flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = COMP_MERGE.flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input_a).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = WCAVRE(colour, mole_fraction).flow.composition
    SET_SKIN SELF "flowing"
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.flow.temperature = 20
    SET self.flow.composition = ""
    SET self.flow.pressure = 0
    DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.rate / 2
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
    SET_SKIN SELF "flowing"
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.flow.composition = ""
    SET self.flow.pressure = 0
    DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
    SET_SKIN SELF "flowing"
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
  END
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.heating = false
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken AND self.active == false THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.active = false
  SET self.heating = false
  SET self.flow.temperature = 20
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.active = true
  ELSE
    ARM dry_run
  END
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
    SET self.heating = false
  ELSE
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
    IF self.active THEN
      SET self.heating = true
      SET self.flow.temperature = 80
    ELSE
      SET self.heating = false
      SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    END
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
  IF self.active THEN
    ARM dry_run
    SET self.broken = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
CALL self.clear_flow
IF self.active THEN
  ARM dry_run
  SET self.broken = true
END

faults.name: dry_run
faults.description: Heater active without fluid flowing through it.

faults.name: heater_electrical
faults.description: Broken heater element energised — deactivate immediately.

componentSets.name: Plant Boundary Components
componentSets.description: Theoretical entry and exit points — not operator-controllable.

actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.receiving = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

listeners.script:
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.receiving = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition

SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

componentSets.name: Specialist Process Components
componentSets.description: Components requiring more complex wiring conventions.

actions.name: update_process_side
actions.script:
IF SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.process_flowing = true
  SET self.process_temp_in = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.temperature
  SET self.process_composition = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.composition
ELSE
  SET self.process_flowing = false
  SET self.process_composition = ""
END

actions.name: update_service_side
actions.script:
IF SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.service_flowing = true
  SET self.service_temp_in = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.temperature
  SET self.service_composition = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.composition
ELSE
  SET self.service_flowing = false
  SET self.service_composition = ""
END

actions.name: update_heat_transfer
actions.script:
IF self.process_flowing AND self.service_flowing THEN
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = true
  SET self.process_temp_out = 80
  SET self.service_temp_out = 40
ELSE
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = false
  SET self.process_temp_out = self.process_temp_in
  IF self.service_flowing THEN
    SET self.service_temp_out = self.service_temp_in
  ELSE
    SET self.service_temp_out = 20
  END
END

actions.name: update_ports
actions.script:
IF self.process_flowing THEN
  SET self.process_out.present = true
  SET self.process_out.flowing = true
  SET self.process_out.rate = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.rate
  SET self.process_out.temperature = self.process_temp_out
  SET self.process_out.composition = self.process_composition
  SET self.process_out.pressure = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.pressure
  SET self.process_out.phase = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.phase
  SET self.process_out.colour = SUPBYPORT(process_in).flow.colour
ELSE
  SET self.process_out.present = false
  SET self.process_out.flowing = false
  SET self.process_out.rate = 0
  SET self.process_out.temperature = 20
  SET self.process_out.composition = ""
  SET self.process_out.pressure = 0
  SET self.process_out.phase = "liquid"
  SET self.process_out.colour = ""
END
IF self.service_flowing THEN
  SET self.service_out.present = true
  SET self.service_out.flowing = true
  SET self.service_out.rate = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.rate
  SET self.service_out.temperature = self.service_temp_out
  SET self.service_out.composition = self.service_composition
  SET self.service_out.pressure = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.pressure
  SET self.service_out.phase = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.phase
  SET self.service_out.colour = SUPBYPORT(service_in).flow.colour
ELSE
  SET self.service_out.present = false
  SET self.service_out.flowing = false
  SET self.service_out.rate = 0
  SET self.service_out.temperature = 20
  SET self.service_out.composition = ""
  SET self.service_out.pressure = 0
  SET self.service_out.phase = "liquid"
  SET self.service_out.colour = ""
END

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
CALL self.update_process_side
CALL self.update_service_side
CALL self.update_heat_transfer
CALL self.update_ports

listeners.script:
SET self.process_blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true
SET SUPBYPORT(process_in).blocked = true

SET self.process_blocked = false
IF self.service_blocked THEN
  SET self.blocked = true
ELSE
  SET self.blocked = false
END
SET SUPBYPORT(process_in).blocked = false

SET self.service_blocked = true
SET self.blocked = true
SET SUPBYPORT(service_in).blocked = true

SET self.service_blocked = false
IF self.process_blocked THEN
  SET self.blocked = true
ELSE
  SET self.blocked = false
END
SET SUPBYPORT(service_in).blocked = false

faults.name: he_fault
faults.description: Heat exchanger operating in fault condition.

componentSets.name: Electrical Components
componentSets.description: Electrical supply, protection, switching, and motor load components.

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.on THEN
  SET self.on = false
ELSE
  SET self.on = true
END

listeners.script:

SET self.electricity.voltage = self.rated_voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = 50

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

faults.name: mains_failure
faults.description: Mains supply has failed — no output available.

listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input).electricity.current_type
SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

faults.name: wire_break

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.closed THEN
  SET self.closed = false
  SET self.electricity.energised = false
  SET self.electricity.current_type = null
  SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
  SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
ELSE
  SET self.closed = true
END

listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input).electricity.current_type
SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

actions.name: reset
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.tripped THEN
  SET self.tripped = false
  SET self.closed = true
END

listeners.condition: ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.closed AND self.tripped == false
listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input).electricity.current_type
SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency

listeners.condition: ANYSUP.electricity.energised == false OR self.closed == false OR self.tripped
listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

listeners.condition: ANYINF.overloaded AND self.closed AND self.tripped == false
listeners.script:
ARM fuse_overload
SET self.tripped = true
SET self.closed = false

faults.name: fuse_overload
faults.description: Circuit breaker tripped on overload — investigate and reset.

listeners.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
  ARM wrong_current_type
  SET self.electricity.energised = false
  SET self.running = false
ELSE
  SET self.electricity.energised = true
  SET self.running = true
END

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.running = false

ARM motor_fault
SET self.running = false
SET self.overloaded = true

faults.name: motor_fault
faults.description: Motor fault — de-energise and investigate.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: AC motor supplied with DC — motor requires AC supply.

listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.lit = true

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.lit = false

SET self.electricity.energised = true
IF SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.energised THEN
  SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.current_type
  SET self.electricity.voltage = SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.voltage
  SET self.electricity.frequency = SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.frequency
ELSE
  IF SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.energised THEN
    SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.current_type
    SET self.electricity.voltage = SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.voltage
    SET self.electricity.frequency = SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.frequency
  ELSE
    IF SUPBYPORT(input_c).electricity.energised THEN
      SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input_c).electricity.current_type
      SET self.electricity.voltage = SUPBYPORT(input_c).electricity.voltage
      SET self.electricity.frequency = SUPBYPORT(input_c).electricity.frequency
    END
  END
END
IF SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.energised AND SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.energised AND SUPBYPORT(input_a).electricity.current_type != SUPBYPORT(input_b).electricity.current_type THEN
  ARM mixed_current_fault
  SET self.electricity.energised = false
  SET self.electricity.current_type = null
  SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
  SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
END

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

faults.name: mixed_current_fault
faults.description: AC and DC sources connected to the same bus — incompatible current types.

listeners.script:

SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input).electricity.current_type
SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

componentSets.name: Instrumentation and Control

listeners.script:
IF self.connected THEN
  SET self.signal = ANYSUP.signal
ELSE
  SET self.signal = 0
END

faults.name: cable_break
faults.description: Signal cable disconnected — control signal lost.

listeners.script:
CALL self.copy_upstream
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.signal = self.flow.rate

CALL self.copy_upstream
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.signal = self.flow.pressure

SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.signal = MINSUP.flow.pressure

CALL self.copy_upstream
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.signal = self.flow.temperature

SET self.signal = SUMSUP.level
IF self.signal <= self.low_setpoint THEN
  SET self.level_low = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_low = false
END
IF self.signal >= self.high_setpoint THEN
  SET self.level_high = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_high = false
END

CALL self.copy_upstream
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow_present = true
SET self.signal = self.flow.rate

CALL self.clear_flow
SET self.flow_present = false
SET self.signal = 0

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  SET self.enabled = false
  SET self.signal = 0
  SET self.output = false
ELSE
  SET self.enabled = true
END

listeners.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  IF ANYSUP.signal < self.setpoint THEN
    SET self.output = true
    SET self.signal = 100
  ELSE
    SET self.output = false
    SET self.signal = 0
  END
END

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  SET self.enabled = false
  SET self.signal = 0
  SET self.output = false
ELSE
  SET self.enabled = true
END

listeners.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  IF ANYSUP.signal < self.setpoint THEN
    SET self.output = true
    SET self.signal = 100
  ELSE
    SET self.output = false
    SET self.signal = 0
  END
END

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  SET self.enabled = false
  SET self.signal = 0
  SET self.output = false
ELSE
  SET self.enabled = true
END

listeners.script:
IF self.enabled THEN
  IF ANYSUP.signal < self.setpoint THEN
    SET self.output = true
    SET self.signal = 100
  ELSE
    SET self.output = false
    SET self.signal = 0
  END

componentSets.name: Pressure Safety Devices
componentSets.description: PRV, Pressure Regulator, and Rupture Disc for Cycle 4.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
SET self.open = false

actions.name: reset
actions.script:
IF MINSUP.flow.pressure < self.set_pressure THEN
  SET self.open = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

listeners.script:
IF MINSUP.flow.pressure > self.set_pressure THEN
  SET self.open = true
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.pressure = 0
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ARM prv_chatter
ELSE
  SET self.open = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

faults.name: prv_chatter
faults.description: PRV chattering under overpressure — reduce upstream pressure immediately.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: copy_upstream
actions.script:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour

listeners.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing AND self.regulating THEN
  CALL self.copy_upstream
  SET self.flow.pressure = self.set_pressure
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing AND self.regulating == false THEN
    CALL self.copy_upstream
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
  ELSE
    IF ANYSUP.flow.present THEN
      SET self.flow.present = true
      SET self.flow.flowing = false
      SET self.flow.rate = 0
      SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
      SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
      SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
    ELSE
      CALL self.clear_flow
    END
  END
END

IF self.intact THEN
  IF MINSUP.flow.pressure > self.burst_pressure THEN
    SET self.intact = false
    ARM disc_burst
  END
ELSE
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.pressure = 0
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
END

IF self.intact == false THEN
  SET self.flow.present = false
  SET self.flow.flowing = false
END

faults.name: disc_burst
faults.description: Rupture disc burst — immediate process loss.

componentSets.name: Mechanical Components
componentSets.description: Shaft transmission domain: shaft edges and drive motors for torque-driven pump systems.

listeners.script:
SET self.shaft.driving = true
SET self.shaft.rpm = SUMSUP.shaft.rpm
SET self.shaft.torque = SUMSUP.shaft.torque

SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0

faults.name: shaft_break
faults.description: Shaft broken — no torque transmission to pump.

actions.name: clear_shaft
actions.script:
SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0

listeners.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
  ARM wrong_current_type
  SET self.electricity.energised = false
  SET self.running = false
  CALL self.clear_shaft
ELSE
  SET self.electricity.energised = true
  SET self.running = true
  SET self.shaft.driving = true
  SET self.shaft.rpm = self.rated_rpm
  SET self.shaft.torque = 100
END

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_shaft

ARM motor_overload
SET self.running = false
SET self.overloaded = true
CALL self.clear_shaft

faults.name: motor_overload
faults.description: Drive motor seized while driving shaft — isolate immediately.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: Drive motor supplied with DC — motor requires AC supply.

listeners.script:
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = MINSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.pressure = MAX(MINSUP.flow.pressure - self.pressure_drop, 0)
SET self.flow.temperature = MINSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.running = true
SET self.shaft.driving = true
IF SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase == "liquid" THEN
  SET self.shaft.rpm = MIN(MINSUP.flow.rate / self.rated_rate * self.rated_rpm, self.rated_rpm) / 2
ELSE
  SET self.shaft.rpm = MIN(MINSUP.flow.rate / self.rated_rate * self.rated_rpm, self.rated_rpm)
END
SET self.shaft.torque = 100

SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0
SET self.running = false

faults.name: turbine_fault
faults.description: Fluid turbine seized — shaft output lost. Close upstream valve to isolate.

actions.name: clear_shaft
actions.script:
SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

listeners.script:
SET self.shaft.driving = true
SET self.shaft.rpm = MAXSUP.shaft.rpm
SET self.shaft.torque = SUMSUP.shaft.torque / COUNTINF
SET_SKIN SELF "driving"

faults.name: shaft_break
faults.description: Advanced drive shaft broken — no torque transmission.

componentSets.name: Advanced Process Components
componentSets.description: Cooler, Check Valve, Vaporizer, Liquid Trap, Strainer, Mixing Valve.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.active = false
ELSE
  SET self.active = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing == false THEN
  CALL self.clear_flow
  RETURN
END
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
IF self.active AND self.broken == false THEN
  SET self.flow.temperature = self.ambient_temp + (SUMSUP.flow.temperature - self.ambient_temp) * (1 - self.effectiveness)
  SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
ELSE
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
END

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.stuck_closed THEN
  SET self.open = false
  CALL self.clear_flow
  RETURN
END
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.open = true
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
  SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
  SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
ELSE
  IF self.stuck_open THEN
    SET self.open = true
  ELSE
    SET self.open = false
  END
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

faults.name: check_valve_stuck_closed
faults.description: Check valve stuck closed — forward flow blocked.

faults.name: check_valve_stuck_open
faults.description: Check valve stuck open — backflow protection lost.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.active = false
ELSE
  SET self.active = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing == false THEN
  CALL self.clear_flow
  RETURN
END
SET self.flow.present = true
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.flow.phase = "gas"
  SET self.flow.temperature = self.boiling_point
ELSE
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
END

faults.name: low_liquid
faults.description: Vaporizer energised with no liquid supply — overheating.

faults.name: overpressure
faults.description: Downstream pressure exceeded safe limit — vent or isolate immediately.

faults.name: steam_inlet
faults.description: Steam detected at vaporizer inlet — reverse flow or incorrect isolation.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: on_toggle_bypass
actions.script:
IF self.bypass_open THEN
  SET self.bypass_open = false
ELSE
  SET self.bypass_open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing == false THEN
  CALL self.clear_flow
  RETURN
END
IF self.bypass_open OR self.functioning == false THEN
  SET self.open = true
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
  SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
  SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
  SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
  SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
ELSE
  IF SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase == "liquid" THEN
    SET self.open = true
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
    SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    SET self.open = false
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = false
    SET self.flow.rate = 0
  END
END

faults.name: failed_open
faults.description: Liquid trap failed open — gas carry-over passing to downstream.

faults.name: failed_closed
faults.description: Liquid trap failed closed — flow completely blocked.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
SET self.blocked = false

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.fouled THEN
  SET self.open = false
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = false
  SET self.flow.rate = 0
  SET self.blocked = true
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.flow.flowing THEN
    SET self.open = true
    SET self.blocked = false
    SET self.flow.present = true
    SET self.flow.flowing = true
    SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
    SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
    SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
    SET self.flow.pressure = MAX(MINSUP.flow.pressure - self.resistance * SUMSUP.flow.rate, 0)
    SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
    SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
  ELSE
    SET self.open = false
    CALL self.clear_flow
  END
END

listeners.script:
ARM fouled_strainer
CALL self.update_flow
ADD_OVERLAY SELF "broken_overlay"

faults.name: fouled_strainer
faults.description: Strainer fouled — switch to standby strainer and clean or replace element.

actions.name: clear_flow
actions.script:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""

actions.name: more_hot
actions.script:
SET self.mix_ratio = MIN(self.mix_ratio + 10, 100)
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: more_cold
actions.script:
SET self.mix_ratio = MAX(self.mix_ratio - 10, 0)
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF SUPBYPORT(hot_in).flow.flowing OR SUPBYPORT(cold_in).flow.flowing THEN
  SET self.flow.present = true
  SET self.flow.flowing = true
  SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
  SET self.flow.temperature = SUPBYPORT(hot_in).flow.temperature * self.mix_ratio / 100 + SUPBYPORT(cold_in).flow.temperature * (100 - self.mix_ratio) / 100
  SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
  SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
  SET self.flow.composition = ""
  SET self.flow.colour = ""
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_flow
END

faults.name: hot_inlet_fault
faults.description: Hot inlet stuck closed — outlet temperature cold-biased.

faults.name: cold_inlet_fault
faults.description: Cold inlet stuck closed — outlet temperature hot-biased.

componentSets.name: Advanced Electrical Components
componentSets.description: Generator, Transformer, VFD, VFD Motor, UPS, Power Meter, Earth Fault Relay, Wind Turbine.

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.running = false
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.shaft.driving AND SUMSUP.shaft.rpm >= self.min_rpm AND self.broken == false THEN
  SET self.running = true
  SET self.electricity.energised = true
  SET self.electricity.current_type = "ac"
  SET self.electricity.voltage = self.rated_voltage * SUMSUP.shaft.rpm / self.rated_rpm
  SET self.electricity.frequency = 50 * SUMSUP.shaft.rpm / self.rated_rpm
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

faults.name: avr_fault
faults.description: Generator AVR fault — output voltage unstable.

listeners.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
  ARM wrong_current_type
  SET self.electricity.energised = false
  SET self.primary_voltage = 0
  SET self.secondary_voltage = 0
  SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
  SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
ELSE
  SET self.electricity.energised = true
  SET self.electricity.current_type = "ac"
  SET self.primary_voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
  SET self.secondary_voltage = self.primary_voltage * self.turns_ratio
  SET self.electricity.voltage = self.secondary_voltage
  SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency
END

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.primary_voltage = 0
SET self.secondary_voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0

ARM winding_fault
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
ADD_OVERLAY SELF "broken_overlay"

faults.name: winding_fault
faults.description: Transformer winding fault — no secondary voltage output.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: Transformer supplied with DC — transformer requires AC to induce secondary voltage.

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.output_speed = 0

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.tripped == false AND self.broken == false THEN
  IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
    ARM wrong_current_type
    CALL self.clear_output
  ELSE
    SET self.electricity.energised = true
    SET self.output_speed = self.speed_setpoint
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

actions.name: increase_speed
actions.script:
SET self.speed_setpoint = MIN(self.speed_setpoint + 10, 100)
CALL self.update_output

actions.name: decrease_speed
actions.script:
SET self.speed_setpoint = MAX(self.speed_setpoint - 10, 0)
CALL self.update_output

actions.name: reset
actions.script:
SET self.tripped = false
CALL self.update_output

faults.name: overtemperature
faults.description: VFD overtemperature trip — motor stopped.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: VFD supplied with DC — VFD requires AC input.

actions.name: clear_shaft
actions.script:
SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0

listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.running = true
SET self.shaft.driving = true
SET self.shaft.rpm = self.rated_rpm * SUMSUP.output_speed / 100
SET self.shaft.torque = SUMSUP.output_speed

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.running = false
CALL self.clear_shaft

ARM motor_overload
SET self.running = false
SET self.overloaded = true
CALL self.clear_shaft

faults.name: motor_overload
faults.description: VFD motor overloaded — isolate and investigate.

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  SET self.running = false
  SET self.shaft.driving = false
  SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
  SET self.shaft.torque = 0
  RETURN
END
SET self.wind_speed = SMOOTH_RANDOM(self.wind_speed, 0, 100, 6)
IF self.wind_speed >= self.cut_in_speed AND self.wind_speed <= self.cut_out_speed THEN
  SET self.running = true
  SET self.shaft.driving = true
  SET self.shaft.rpm = self.rated_rpm * self.wind_speed / 100
  SET self.shaft.torque = self.wind_speed
ELSE
  SET self.running = false
  SET self.shaft.driving = false
  SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
  SET self.shaft.torque = 0
END

faults.name: pitch_fault
faults.description: Wind turbine pitch control failed — turbine cannot cut out at high wind speed.

faults.name: yaw_fault
faults.description: Wind turbine yaw fault — turbine turned out of wind, no generation.

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.exporting = false
SET self.measured_voltage = 0
SET self.measured_frequency = 0
SET self.voltage_ok = false
SET self.frequency_ok = false
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.connected AND self.broken == false AND self.protection_tripped == false THEN
  IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
    ARM wrong_current_type
    CALL self.clear_output
  ELSE
    SET self.measured_voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
    SET self.measured_frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency
    IF self.measured_voltage >= self.min_voltage AND self.measured_voltage <= self.max_voltage THEN
      SET self.voltage_ok = true
    ELSE
      SET self.voltage_ok = false
    END
    IF self.measured_frequency >= self.min_frequency AND self.measured_frequency <= self.max_frequency THEN
      SET self.frequency_ok = true
    ELSE
      SET self.frequency_ok = false
    END
    IF self.voltage_ok AND self.frequency_ok THEN
      SET self.exporting = true
      SET_SKIN SELF "exporting"
    ELSE
      SET self.exporting = false
      SET self.protection_tripped = true
      DEFAULT_SKIN SELF
      IF self.voltage_ok == false THEN
        ARM voltage_protection_trip
      END
      IF self.frequency_ok == false THEN
        ARM frequency_protection_trip
      END
    END
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.broken OR self.protection_tripped THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.connected THEN
  SET self.connected = false
  CALL self.clear_output
ELSE
  SET self.connected = true
  CALL self.update_output
END

actions.name: reset_trip
actions.script:
SET self.protection_tripped = false
SET self.voltage_ok = false
SET self.frequency_ok = false
IF self.connected THEN
  CALL self.update_output
END

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.connected THEN
  CALL self.update_output
END

listeners.script:
IF self.exporting THEN
  ARM anti_islanding_failure
END
CALL self.clear_output

faults.name: voltage_protection_trip
faults.description: Grid voltage outside ±6 % nominal while connected — protection tripped.

faults.name: frequency_protection_trip
faults.description: Grid frequency outside 49.5–50.5 Hz while connected — protection tripped.

faults.name: anti_islanding_failure
faults.description: Upstream supply lost while export was live — anti-islanding protection required.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: Grid export supplied with DC — grid connection requires AC supply.

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  CALL self.clear_output
  RETURN
END
IF self.discharge_mode AND self.state_of_charge > 0 THEN
  SET self.electricity.energised = true
  SET self.electricity.current_type = "dc"
  SET self.electricity.voltage = self.rated_voltage
  SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
  SET self.electricity.current = 0
  SET_SKIN SELF "discharging"
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
SET self.electricity.current = 0
DEFAULT_SKIN SELF

actions.name: toggle_discharge_mode
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.discharge_mode THEN
  SET self.discharge_mode = false
ELSE
  SET self.discharge_mode = true
END

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
IF self.charging THEN
  SET self.state_of_charge = MIN(self.state_of_charge + 0.5, 100)
ELSE
  IF self.electricity.energised THEN
    SET self.state_of_charge = MAX(self.state_of_charge - 0.5, 0)
    IF self.state_of_charge <= 0 THEN
      ARM depletion_fault
      SET self.broken = true
      CALL self.clear_output
    END
  END
END

listeners.condition: ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.discharge_mode == false AND self.broken == false
ANYSUP.electricity.energised == false OR self.discharge_mode OR self.broken

faults.name: depletion_fault
faults.description: Battery fully depleted while in discharge mode — all stored energy exhausted.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: Battery supplied with AC — battery charging requires DC input.

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.broken == false THEN
  IF ANYSUP.electricity.current_type == "dc" THEN
    ARM wrong_current_type
    CALL self.clear_output
  ELSE
    SET self.electricity.energised = true
    SET self.electricity.current_type = "dc"
    SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage * self.efficiency
    SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
    SET self.electricity.current = 0
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
SET self.electricity.current = 0

faults.name: rectifier_fault
faults.description: Rectifier internal fault — AC to DC conversion failed.

faults.name: wrong_current_type
faults.description: Rectifier supplied with DC — rectifier requires AC input.

actions.name: update_output
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.electricity.energised AND self.broken == false THEN
  SET self.input_frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency
  IF self.tripped THEN
    SET self.electricity.energised = true
    SET self.electricity.current_type = "ac"
    SET self.electricity.voltage = self.rated_voltage
    SET self.electricity.frequency = self.input_frequency
    SET self.electricity.current = 0
  ELSE
    SET self.electricity.energised = true
    SET self.electricity.current_type = "ac"
    SET self.electricity.voltage = self.rated_voltage
    SET self.electricity.frequency = 50
    SET self.electricity.current = 0
  END
ELSE
  CALL self.clear_output
END

actions.name: clear_output
actions.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
SET self.electricity.current = 0

actions.name: reset_trip
actions.script:
IF self.broken THEN
  RETURN
END
SET self.tripped = false
CALL self.update_output

faults.name: inverter_fault
faults.description: Inverter internal fault — output frequency is no longer stabilised.

listeners.script:
SET self.electricity.energised = true
SET self.electricity.current_type = SUPBYPORT(input).electricity.current_type
SET self.electricity.voltage = MINSUP.electricity.voltage
SET self.electricity.frequency = MINSUP.electricity.frequency
SET self.active = true

SET self.electricity.energised = false
SET self.electricity.current_type = null
SET self.electricity.voltage = 0
SET self.electricity.frequency = 0
SET self.active = false

scriptTemplates.clear_flow:
SET self.flow.present = false
SET self.flow.flowing = false
SET self.flow.rate = 0
SET self.flow.temperature = 20
SET self.flow.composition = ""
SET self.flow.pressure = 0
SET self.flow.phase = "liquid"
SET self.flow.colour = ""
scriptTemplates.copy_upstream:
SET self.flow.flowing = true
SET self.flow.rate = SUMSUP.flow.rate
SET self.flow.temperature = SUMSUP.flow.temperature
SET self.flow.composition = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.composition
SET self.flow.pressure = MINSUP.flow.pressure
SET self.flow.phase = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.phase
SET self.flow.colour = SUPBYPORT(input).flow.colour
scriptTemplates.clear_shaft:
SET self.shaft.driving = false
SET self.shaft.rpm = 0
SET self.shaft.torque = 0
scriptTemplates.copy_shaft_upstream:
SET self.shaft.driving = true
SET self.shaft.rpm = SUMSUP.shaft.rpm
SET self.shaft.torque = SUMSUP.shaft.torque
